studyName: Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh

tables.description: Subject ID, sex, age at enrollment, age at marriage, birth order, birth, death, abortion, MR, delivery, family type, father education, father occupation, food, gestation age, living children, live firths, monthly expenditure, monthly income, maternal age, maternal education, maternal height and weight, mother occupation, marriage, place of birth, place of enrollment, pregnancy, sleeping in household, siblings, supplements, and specimen sequence of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

variables.name: lvbrt
variables.description: Total live births in lifetime (Including the current one)

variables.name: mtp
variables.description: Number of still birth/death/ abortion/MR, DE and C

variables.name: mtt
variables.description: Number of tetanus toxoid (TT) received during THIS Pregnancy

variables.name: pepl
variables.description: Number of people usually sleeping in household

tables.description: This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, age at enrollment, sex, places of enrollment and birth, food since birth, estimated gestational age, maternal age, number of marriages, ages at marriage and at first pregnancy, total live births, number of still birth, current deliver and delivery status, number of tetanus toxoid (TT) received during this pregnancy, supplements (n= 7 variables; Zinc, Iron, Folic acids, Calcium, Vitamin A, other, specify other), birth order, number of siblings under 5 years, number of living children, number of people sleeping in household, family type, father and mother educations, father and mother occupations, monthly income and expenditure, and maternal weight and height.

variables.name: lvbrt
variables.description: Total live births in lifetime (Including the current one)

variables.name: mtp
variables.description: Number of still birth/death/ abortion/MR, DE and C

variables.name: mtt
variables.description: Number of tetanus toxoid (TT) received during THIS Pregnancy

variables.name: pepl
variables.description: Number of people usually sleeping in household

tables.description: Subject ID, age of child, Ascaris Lumbricoides, Blastocystis hominis, blood, consistency, Escherichia coli, Endolimax Nana, Giardia, Hook worm, Hymenolepis nana, Iodamoeba butschlii, macrophages, micro Eh/Ed, mucus, Pus cell, RBC, specimen number, specimen sequence, Strongyloides stercoralis, Trichomonas hominis, and Trichuris trichiura of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

Subject ID, age since birth, breastfeeding, days since enrollment, dehydration symptoms, diarrheal episode, days of observation, rehydration, repeat sample, rotavirus, peak score, score assigned to variable temp to derive RUUSKA, temperature, and vomiting of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

variables.name: daysenc
variables.description: Days since enrollment for each episode

variables.name: dehydsc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable dehydration to derive RUUSKA : F

variables.name: diadursc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable duration of diarrheal episode to derive RUUSKA: A

variables.name: epiexlbf
variables.description: Days of exclusive breastfeeding prior to the episode

variables.name: epinum
variables.description: Diarrheal stool episode number assigned in sequence to each episode

variables.name: episevrt
variables.description: Severity of Diarrhea during each episode (number of diarrheal stool/24 hours)

variables.name: feversc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable Temp to derive RUUSKA: E

variables.name: mxdrnosc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable Severity of diarrhea to derive RUUSKA : B

variables.name: mxvomtsc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable Severity of vomiting  to derive RUUSKA : D

variables.name: rehyd
variables.description: Rehydration treatment prescribed during that episode

variables.name: rehydsc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable rehydration prescribed during that episode to derive RUUSKA : G

variables.name: rotads
variables.description: Rotavirus by ELISA in diarrheal stool

variables.name: ruuska
variables.description: Peak score (A+ B + C + D + E + F + G) per episode

variables.name: vomdursc
variables.description: Score assigned to variable Duration of vomiting to derive RUUSKA : C

variables.name: vomsevrt
variables.description: Severity of vomiting (number of vomiting/24 hours)

variables.name: vomtdays
variables.description: Duration of vomiting during the Diarrheal episode

tables.description: This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, age, specimen number, specimen sequence, consistency, Ascaris Lumbricoides, Blastocystis hominis, blood, Escherichia coli, Endolimax Nana, Giardia, Hook worm, Hymenolepis nana, Iodamoeba butschlii, macrophages, micro Eh/Ed, mucus, Pus cell, RBC, Strongyloides stercoralis, Trichomonas hominis, and Trichuris trichiura.

This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, diarrheal stool episode number, days since enrollment and days of observation, diarrhea duration and severity, vomiting duration and severity, temperature, dehydration symptoms, rehydration treatment, score assigned to variables (n= 7 variables; diarrhea duration, diarrhea severity, vomiting duration, vomiting severity, fever, dehydration, and rehydration), peak score, days of exclusive breastfeeding, age since birth, and Rotavirus by ELISA in diarrheal stool.

tables.description: Subject ID, age of child, cognitive score, communication score, language, motor score, social-emotional score, and study visit of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, visit number, age, raw, scaled and/or composite score (n=17 variables; cognitive, receptive communication, express communication, language, fine motor, gross motor, and social-emotional), and motor scaled sum.

Subject ID, HLA, specimen number, and visit week of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.
This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, specimen number, visit week, and HLA alleles 1 and 2 (n=12 variables; A, B, DRB1, DRB3, DQA1, and DQB1).

Subject ID, age of child, Astro Ct value, Astrovirus, Noro Ct value, Norovirus, reason for repeating, Rotavirus, Rota Ct value, Sapo Ct value, Sapovirus, specimen number, and specimen sequence of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

variables.name: rept
variables.description: Do you need to Repeat Sample?

tables.description: This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, age, specimen number, specimen sequence, Ct value (n= 4 variables; Rota, Astro, Noro, Sapo), virus using a multiplex qRT-PCR (n= 4 variables; Rota, Astro, Noro, Sapo), sample repeat, and repeat reason.

variables.name: rept
variables.description: Do you need to Repeat Sample?

tables.description: Subject ID, age of child, BMI, cumulative episode, days since enrollment, height, weight, breastfeeding, and study visit week of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

variables.name: bmi
variables.description: BMI derived (Wt in Kg/Ht in meter 2)

variables.name: cumepisd
variables.description: Cumulative episode # up to current visit

variables.name: haz
variables.description: Height for age assessed using MGRS application

variables.name: vstexlbf
variables.description: Number of exclusive breastfeeding days at that visit

variables.name: waz
variables.description: Weight for age assessed using MGRS application

variables.name: whz
variables.description: Weight for height assessed using MGRS application

tables.description: This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, visit week, days since enrollment, age, weight, height, cumulative episode, weight and height for age assessed using MGRS application, weight for height assessed using MGRS application, BMI, and number of exclusive breastfeeding days.

variables.name: bmi
variables.description: BMI derived (Wt in Kg/Ht in meter 2)

variables.name: cumepisd
variables.description: Cumulative episode # up to current visit

variables.name: haz
variables.description: Height for age assessed using MGRS application

variables.name: vstexlbf
variables.description: Number of exclusive breastfeeding days at that visit

variables.name: waz
variables.description: Weight for age assessed using MGRS application

variables.description: Weight for height assessed using MGRS application

tables.description: Subject ID, age of child, Entamoeba histolytica, Cryptosporidium, Giardia, and specimen number of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, age, specimen number, specimen sequence, Giardia Ct value, Giardia, Entamoeba histolytica Ct value, Entamoeba histolytica, Cryptosporidium Ct value, and Cryptosporidium.

Subject ID, age of child, Titer Sabin, specimen number, and visit week of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.
This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, age, specimen number, visit week, and Titer Sabins 1, 2, and 3.

Subject ID, family ID, father ID, mother ID, sex, and monozygotic twin ID of participants with or without vaccination against Oral polio and rotavirus and involved in the "Exploration of the Biologic Basis for Underperformance of Oral Polio and Rotavirus Vaccines in Bangladesh" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

tables.description: This sample attributes file includes sample ID, body site where sample was taken, analyte type, and tumor status.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

tables.description: This subject phenotype file includes subject ID, specimen type, specimen sequence, and Entamoeba histolytica status.
The subject consent file includes subject ID, consent information, and sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.
